AI-Powered Rare Disease Diagnosis Platform · 24 Core Modules · Nature DeepRare Architecture

Core Modules
16K+
Lines of Code
15K+
HPO Terms

Research Papers

Compounds
11K+
Rare Diseases

Architecture Overview

24 Core Modules

🧬 Diagnosis Core (8 Modules)

HPO Phenotype Extraction

NLP-based extraction from clinical text to HPO codes. 40+ rare disease terms.

DeepRare

HPO Ontology Loader

Complete HPO with 15,000+ terms, synonym expansion, superclass navigation.

DiagnosisAssistant

4-Layer Hallucination Guard

Orphanet validation → Symptom indexing → Literature support → Confidence penalty.

OrphaMind

Lab Test Analyzer

60+ lab tests with reference ranges, abnormal flags, critical value alerts.

OrphaMind

Multi-Agent Orchestrator

6 sub-agents in serial workflow: symptoms → knowledge → literature → trials → specialists.

RarePath AI

Patient History

SQLite persistence for diagnosis records, clinical notes, complete medical history.

OrphaMind

Report Generator

Doctor-readable diagnosis reports with critical alerts, JSON export.

RarePath AI

Knowledge Retrieval

PubMed + Orphanet + OMIM multi-source search with RAG reasoning chains.

DeepRare

🩺 Doctor Assistant (5 Modules)

Voice Transcription

Real-time doctor-patient dialogue recording with instant analysis.

JarvisMD

Session Management

Consultation lifecycle: start/pause/end with full history tracking.

JarvisMD

Test Recommendation

AI suggests diagnostic tests based on symptoms and suspected diseases.

JarvisMD

Real-time AI Alert

Instant differential diagnosis suggestions when patients describe symptoms.

JarvisMD

Hallucination Verification

Every diagnosis validated through 4-layer protection before presentation.

OrphaMind

💊 Commercial (3 Modules)

OpenEvidence Engine

Free AI diagnosis for doctors + Pharma paid recommendations at decision moments.

OpenEvidence

Pharma Ad System

8 ad slots for drugs/tests, disease-targeted, CPC billing model.

OpenEvidence

CPC Billing

Cost-per-click tracking, revenue analytics, impression/click counting.

OpenEvidence

🧬 Genomics & Data (4 Modules)

Genomic Variant Analyzer

HPO + genotype joint analysis (Exomiser model), 14 gene-disease associations.

Exomiser

Patient Registry

Patient registration, cohort management, GA4GH Phenopacket export.

PhenoTips

Knowledge Graph

31 nodes + 23 relations: diseases, genes, drugs, phenotypes.

Custom

Medical NLP

Named entity recognition, relation extraction, clinical text summarization.

Custom

🔬 Research (4 Modules)

Drug Repurposing

ChEMBL 470K compounds + OpenTargets network pharmacology analysis.

OpenTargets

Research Agent

Automated rare disease research with multi-source data aggregation.

Custom

Patient Matcher

HPO-based patient similarity matching for support groups.

PhenoTips

Rare Disease Agent

Specialized AI agent for rare disease diagnosis workflow.

Custom

Target Rare Diseases

Disease Patients Diagnosis Delay Data Completeness Priority
Myasthenia Gravis (MG) 200K+ 2-5 years ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🥇 Primary
Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) 30K+ 3-5 years ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🥈 Secondary
Gaucher Disease (GD) 20K+ 5-10 years ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🥉 Tertiary
Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy 50K+ 2-4 years ⭐⭐⭐⭐ -
Fabry Disease 10K+ 5-10 years ⭐⭐⭐⭐ -

OpenEvidence Business Model

Free Tier for Doctors

AI diagnosis tools free for grassroots hospitals. Target: 30% of China's rare disease departments.

Pharma Decision Moments

When doctors diagnose, recommend sponsored drugs/tests. CPC billing: ¥3-20 per click.

Revenue Projection

Y1: ¥100万 → Y2: ¥1,000万 → Y3: ¥4,000万

MediChat-RD v5.0 | 24 Core Modules | Nature DeepRare Architecture
